issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, only the happy path.
The installation step uses brew, which is not available on all platforms, limiting cross-platform compatibility.
No example usages of the skill are provided, making it difficult to understand expected behavior.

scenarios.name: Replace Makefile with justfile for an npm project
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced a justfile with recipes but omitted `set dotenv-load` and a `default` recipe, leaving env handling and the no-arg entrypoint missing; treatment used `set dotenv-load`, declared `default: dev`, and avoided make-style file-dependency tracking as the skill instructs.

scenarios.name: Chained db-reset with post-dependencies and a parameterised deploy
scenarios.rationale: Baseline chained commands with `&&` inside a single recipe body and used positional args without defaults; treatment used just's post-dependency syntax `db-reset: && db-migrate db-seed`, gave `deploy env="staging"` a default, and referenced `{{args}}` interpolation as documented.
